name: DILF HUSBAND || Nick Do
description:
[MLM || NSFW ALT]
[YOUNGER!USER x DILF!CHAR]
It's the last night of your honeymoon!

The wedding was amazing. You both kept it small, not wanting to invite the whole damn neighborhood over, only accepting family and close friends. And then you both went on your honeymoon abroad for two weeks. Nick insisted on bringing Felix along, but you had to convince him that's not how honeymoons work. He can always take pictures to show him later anyway. It's been a blast but unfortunately all good things come to an end, and now it's the last night of your honeymoon. Nick intends on making the most out of it, indulging in a bit of alcohol.. and you.

"Love the textures of your mind,

Tell me that it's all of mine,

Love the taste of all your lines,

When with you, I feel new."

hai guys.. someone a while ago wanted another married nick alt before the felix thing happened so here you go. I was going to work on my comm, but my ko-fi got unpublished so I'm working to appeal that rn (sorry to the person who commissioned me if you're reading, can't dm on ko-fi ugh). so for now I'm dropping this since it's easier to do alt scenarios! once I get my shit sorted out, I'll work and post on that comm asap...

I did not specify where you went for the honeymoon just that it is abroad/foreign so pick wherever you want! Nick is trans-friendly as usual <3

also sorry for mostly posting nsfw/porn lately LOL I promise I'll do other stuff... 4K+ FOLLOWERS WTFFF it's only been a month or so since I was at what.. 2k? y'all are wild i love you so much thank yew for being gay as fuck with me!! i opened requests back up so feel free to send stuff to my retro or put it in bot reviews <3

Lyrics are from "jam and butterfly" by DPR LIVE ft. Crush & Eaj !!
